verses.text: Woe to those who devise iniquity on their beds and seize fields and houses by violence. Premeditated greed. Sin planned in private is exposed and judged by God.
Woe to those who devise iniquity on their beds and seize fields and houses by violence. Premeditated greed. Sin planned in private is exposed and judged by God.
Against this family God devises an evil; in that day they shall lament 'with a doleful lamentation.' Schemers ensnared. Those who plot evil meet an evil of God's planning.
Against this family God devises an evil; in that day they shall lament 'with a doleful lamentation.' Schemers ensnared. Those who plot evil meet an evil of God's planning.
Against this family God devises an evil; in that day they shall lament 'with a doleful lamentation.' Schemers ensnared. Those who plot evil meet an evil of God's planning.
'Prophesy ye not,' they say; but is the Spirit straitened? His words 'do good to him that walketh uprightly.' Truth resisted. The wicked silence the word that would have helped the upright.
'Prophesy ye not,' they say; but is the Spirit straitened? His words 'do good to him that walketh uprightly.' Truth resisted. The wicked silence the word that would have helped the upright.
They strip the robe, cast women from their homes, and rob the children of God's glory. Heartless oppression. To wrong the helpless is to offend their God.
They strip the robe, cast women from their homes, and rob the children of God's glory. Heartless oppression. To wrong the helpless is to offend their God.
Depart, for the polluted land is not your rest; a prophet of 'wine and... strong drink' is the one they want. Itching ears. A corrupt people prefers preachers who promise indulgence.
Depart, for the polluted land is not your rest; a prophet of 'wine and... strong drink' is the one they want. Itching ears. A corrupt people prefers preachers who promise indulgence.
'I will surely assemble... O Jacob'; the Breaker goes before them, and the LORD at their head. A gleam of hope. God will yet gather and lead His flock home.
'I will surely assemble... O Jacob'; the Breaker goes before them, and the LORD at their head. A gleam of hope. God will yet gather and lead His flock home.
